Video.title: It's Sew Easy: Mesh Sleeves

All Free Sewing: Sewing Alteration Series - How To Hem a Skirt Part 3 and Skirt Reveal!

Video.summary: Whenever I have a new student in the shop, I try to convey what if feels like when something is going wrong on the tablesaw. This may seem like an abstract idea, but knowing how to identify a problem before it goes too far could give you that extra second or two you need to prevent disaster.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Safety - Tablesaw Experience

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Safety - Tablesaw Experience
The Wood Whisperer: Shop Safety - Tablesaw Experience

Video.summary: Craft Room Crash: Knots of Color Everywhere - Custom Plant Pot Jane crashes the craft rooms of America's most talented and creative makers. In this episode, Jane shows you how to make a colorful flower pot.
Video.title: Craft Room Crash: Knots of Color Everywhere - Custom Plant Pot

Image.alt: Craft Room Crash: Knots of Color Everywhere - Custom Plant Pot
Craft Room Crash: Knots of Color Everywhere - Custom Plant Pot

Video.summary: Angela continues her two part tutorial on how to make a bella knit top: now it's time for top sleeves!
Video.title: It's Sew Easy: Bella Top Sleeves

Image.alt: It's Sew Easy: Bella Top Sleeves
It's Sew Easy: Bella Top Sleeves

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Sew? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get strated and then move on to some simple projects such as making a lined tote bag to practise what you have learnt. You will find out what equipment you'll need, larn some brilliant tips to make beautiful creations including a patchwork cushion and elasticated skirt!
Video.title: Learn to Sew

Image.alt: Learn to Sew
Learn to Sew

Video.summary: Learn how to make a stylish trench coat. Sew along with Angela!
Video.title: It's Sew Easy: Lesson 1 Trench Coat Sewalong

Image.alt: It's Sew Easy: Lesson 1 Trench Coat Sewalong
It's Sew Easy: Lesson 1 Trench Coat Sewalong

Video.summary: Angela Wolf shows how to thread a serger.
Video.title: It's Sew Easy: Threading the Serger

Image.alt: It's Sew Easy: Threading the Serger
It's Sew Easy: Threading the Serger

Video.summary: Go on a woodworkers' shop tour with Marc in this episode and see how it is done by master woodworkers!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: The King and His Castle aka A Guy in a Garage

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: The King and His Castle aka A Guy in a Garage
The Wood Whisperer: The King and His Castle aka A Guy in a Garage

Video.summary: A quick Whisper Mini tour of my recent 6-panel cabinet project.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cabinet Project Tour

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Cabinet Project Tour
The Wood Whisperer: Cabinet Project Tour

Video.summary: A hand-made wooden clock is one of those projects I like to marvel at. I'm not sure I have enough patience to cut out one wooden gear let alone the multitude required to construct a fully-functional clock! Thankfully, my buddy Rick Urschel is not nearly as impatient as I am and filmed one of his early efforts at making the Simplicity Clock as designed by Clayton Boyer.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Wooden Gear Clock

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Wooden Gear Clock
The Wood Whisperer: Wooden Gear Clock

Video.summary: "This is a Wood Whisperer first: a series featuring an aspiring luthier, Rick Urschel. Rick takes us through the process of building a classic guitar from a kit available at LMII.com. This is Rick’s first attempt at a guitar, and as such, I am not presenting this as a “how-to”. Instead, this is just one man’s experience as he works his butt off making a beautiful guitar for his wife. I think you are really going to enjoy it. A special thanks to Rick for allowing me to “Whisperize” his content!"
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 1

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 1
The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 1

Video.summary: Recently, I came across a post in the Wood Whisperer Community Facebook Page where a new woodworker asked for advice on beginner-friendly books. Several folks replied with something like, "Don't waste your money and time, just go to YouTube." Every time you say something like this, a tiny baby bookmark bursts into flames.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: YouTube vs Books

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: YouTube vs Books
The Wood Whisperer: YouTube vs Books

Video.summary: I really don't have much spare time in my schedule right now but I decided to fast-track (haha, get it? track?) this review so that you can hopefully make a more informed purchase decision if you happen to be interested in this unit.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Grizzly Track Saw Review

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Grizzly Track Saw Review
The Wood Whisperer: Grizzly Track Saw Review

Video.summary: The Castle Bookcase is not only great for storage but also serves as a creative play center for kids of all ages. It features four shelves, a functional drawbridge, battlements, and windows. The entire thing is made from two sheets of plywood and is constructed using glue and screws. For additional strength you can cut dados for the shelves as demonstrated in the video.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Castle Bookcase

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Castle Bookcase
The Wood Whisperer: Castle Bookcase

Video.summary: If you have concrete as ugly as mine, an Epoxy floor makeover might be just what the doctor ordered.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Epoxy Floor Makeover

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Epoxy Floor Makeover
The Wood Whisperer: Epoxy Floor Makeover

Video.summary: Router Table Suggestions, Cool Christmas gifts, Opinions on the Harvey table saw, Is CA glue accelerator a scam, Advice for a cutting board that lives outside.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Your Questions Answered! Ask TWW

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Your Questions Answered! Ask TWW
The Wood Whisperer: Your Questions Answered! Ask TWW

Video.summary: Some tips that might save you some heartache, time and money.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: 10 Things I Wish I Knew When I Started Woodworking

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: 10 Things I Wish I Knew When I Started Woodworking
The Wood Whisperer: 10 Things I Wish I Knew When I Started Woodworking

Video.summary: Last summer, on our Gadget Station delivery trip, we decided to stop and visit the one and only David Marks. If you’re not familiar with David, he is an incredible woodworker/designer and used to host a show on HGTV and the DIY Network called Woodworks. His show was a huge influence on me personally and I know thousands of other woodworkers feel the same way.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour
The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour

Video.summary: An honest real world review of the most inexpensive parallel clamp on the market, the Harbor Freight Bremen Parallel Clamp.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Harbor Freight Bremen Parallel Clamp Review

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Harbor Freight Bremen Parallel Clamp Review
The Wood Whisperer: Harbor Freight Bremen Parallel Clamp Review

Video.summary: A hassle-free method for setting up a dado blade with no measuring! All it takes is a flat surface and one of the most sensitive measuring devices in your shop: your fingers!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade
The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade

Video.summary: The first time I saw a flexible sanding strip in action was while watching an episode of Woodworks going on almost 10 years ago. David Marks incorporates lots of curves in his work and the man knows a thing or two about making them. Since then, I have made numerous sanding strips in all shapes and sizes and my curves are about as perfect and smooth as they can be.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Flexible Sanding Strip

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Flexible Sanding Strip
The Wood Whisperer: Flexible Sanding Strip

Video.summary: Finally, a thorough look at my new digs. Now my hope is that this shop is just temporary until we sell the other house. But until then, I can make my 3-car garage a comfortable place to produce great projects! Enjoy the shop tour!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: October 2009 Shop Tour

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: October 2009 Shop Tour
The Wood Whisperer: October 2009 Shop Tour

Video.summary: Some things to consider when buying a new table saw.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: What Table Saw Should I Buy?

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: What Table Saw Should I Buy?
The Wood Whisperer: What Table Saw Should I Buy?

Video.summary: A beautiful dining table made from cherry featuring breadboard ends. Mom loves it!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Breadboard End Dining Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Breadboard End Dining Table
The Wood Whisperer: Breadboard End Dining Table

Video.summary: How to refinish an exterior door without taking it down.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Refinishing a Door Without Taking it Off The Hinges

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Refinishing a Door Without Taking it Off The Hinges
The Wood Whisperer: Refinishing a Door Without Taking it Off The Hinges

Video.summary: The original sitting bench step stool serves as a model for a new and improved version. Templates are created and the initial leg curves are cut and shaped.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sitting Bench Step Stool Part 1

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Sitting Bench Step Stool Part 1
The Wood Whisperer: Sitting Bench Step Stool Part 1

Video.summary: I spend a lot of time helping new woodworkers solve problems. This gives me a unique perspective on the potential stumble point that most woodworkers will experience. Eventually, these things become woodworking common sense but until that time, I consider it woodworking not-so-common sense. So here are five tips that most woodworkers eventually figure out on their own.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking Not-So-Common Sense

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking Not-So-Common Sense
The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking Not-So-Common Sense
